title: Find My Device - User location on the map
scenario: User location on the map should display correctly based on platform-specific zoom behavior when opening Find My Device from the App Menu with GPS allowed
steps: Open Find My Device from the App Menu (with GPS allowed)
Observe the user's location on the map
expected: On Android: a full blue dot is shown when zoomed out, and a blue circle with a full blue dot in the center when zoomed in. On iOS: a full blue dot is shown when zoomed out, and a white circle when zoomed in.
